title: pavonia pulchra
intro: Pavonia pulchra, also known as the 'Rose Mallow', is a flowering plant species native to Central America and parts of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pavonia pulchra include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through infusions or decoctions to create herbal remedies, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to alleviate various health issues.
